description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it's sure to accommodate everything you need, while you strut around looking super cool! Height: 47 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 10 cm Warranty: 3 months Made of nylon for enhanced durability One main zippered compartment with two zippered pockets and a keyholder Haul loop Toggle straps along the front Two zippered pockets on the front Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
